name: @metorial/fingertip
description: Create, manage, and customize business websites with pages, themes, and content blocks. Manage bookings and event types including creating, rescheduling, and cancelling appointments. Process orders, create and manage invoices, and handle site contacts and client relationships. Collect form submissions, publish blog posts, and retrieve site analytics. Control site memberships, workspace collaboration, and register webhooks for real-time event notifications on bookings, orders, forms, and contacts.
